hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(cat - | jq -r .tool_input.command); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "^git push.*(main|master)"; then echo "ERROR: Direct push to main/master blocked. Use a feature branch and PR instead." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'FILE=$(cat - | jq -r .tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then case "$FILE" in *.js|*.jsx|*.ts|*.tsx|*.json|*.css|*.md|*.html|*.yaml|*.yml) npx --yes prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.py) python -m black "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || python -m autopep8 --in-place "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.go) gofmt -w "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.tf) terraform fmt "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac; fi'
